Translation.Description: Could this possibly be the headpiece of one of the mythical Plane Travelers? Luck of the Saints, why it is! Because the general theory of dimensional shifting requires a very specific and very convoluted mindset, you will have to satisfy yourself with activating only its most basic powers. Don't you pout now, blinking around in a semi-tangible state ain't exactly chopped liver.
Translation.Provides: Allows the unit to cast Dimensional Translocation
